title: Final Dominion
description: Added a bunch of equipment, tools and materials to the game
body: This mod adds a large number of items to the game, including weapons, equipment, tools and materials. The equipment in this mod is usually very powerful, but also difficult to obtain. Some equipment and weapons have special effects, some weapons and tools have right-click functions, and equipment provides permanent effects. In addition, you can include this mod in your mod pack. Finally, thank you for playing
